chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. D – 37 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.334/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.335/2024 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of bail application 02.04.2024 Mr. Abdul Majeed Memon, Advocate for the applicant / accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Applicants / accused (i) Muhammad Hussain alias Muhammad Ali S/o Bakht Ali, (ii) Sabir S/o Hussain Bux alias Dost Ali and (iii) Naseer Khan alias Naseer S/o Khan Muhammad alias Bashir, all by caste Lathani Mazari, seek protective bail in Crime No.12 of 2024 registered at Police Station Khambra, District Ghotki for offences under Sections 365-A PPC and 7 of Anti-Terrorism Act, 1997. It is, inter alia, contended that applicants are innocent and have falsely been implicated in this case by the police. It is further contended that applicants are prepared to surrender before the trial Court, but apprehend their arrest as NBWs have been issued against them. Serious mala fide on the part of police is alleged. Without touching the merits of the case, protective bail for a period of seven days is granted to the applicants / accused subject to their furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.30,000/- (Rupees thirty thousand) each and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of the Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of NBWs is suspended for a period of seven days. Applicants / accused are directed to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of seven days or whenever the applicants / accused surrender before the trial Court, which one occurs earlier.

Applicants / accused are directed to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of seven days or whenever the applicants / accused surrender before the trial Court, which one occurs earlier. In case, applicants / accused fail to surrender before the trial Court in the aforesaid period, their bail bonds shall stand automatically forfeited. Criminal bail application stands disposed of along with the listed applications in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
